title: Add Board / Doc to Folder via API
excerpt:
We can create folders via the API but we can’t assign board / docs into those folders which doesn’t make much sense. 
We’re creating repetitive reports (each is a new doc in the left panel navigation) and it clutters the…

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
We can create folders via the API but we can’t assign board / docs into those folders which doesn’t make much sense.

We’re creating repetitive reports (each is a new doc in the left panel navigation) and it clutters the user’s navigation panel. We would like to add those to a folder but it’s not possible.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Fantasy-Media-Team ,

Thank you for the request!

Everyone: You can vote for it at the top of the screen

Cheers,
Matias
